Enforces Trinity witness consensus. Can veto any agent. Escalates to human sovereign (000-SALAM) on paradoxes. The buck stops here — but sovereignty stays with the human.

skills.name: ΦΙ JUDGE Role Binding (888-APEX)
skills.description: Hermes binds to 888-APEX role for narration and request only (never final verdict). Loads arifos-arconstitutional-audit, fff-loop-protocol, kernel-observation-self-test, hold-protocol. Verdict authority stays in arifOS kernel. See contracts/hermes-role-binding.md. F1-F13 enforced.

skills.name: Constitutional Arbitration (F1-F13)
skills.description: Evaluate any agent output or proposed action against all 13 constitutional floors. Returns verdict (SEAL/PARTIAL/SABAR/VOID/888_HOLD) with per-floor pass/fail breakdown, evidence cited, and next-actions.
examples: Judge this prospect evaluation for SEAL readiness
Should this destructive operation proceed or 888_HOLD?
Arbitrate the conflict between 333-AGI and 555-ASI outputs

skills.name: Trinity Witness Consensus
skills.description: Collect and evaluate witness statements from all three primary agents (333-AGI Δ, 555-ASI Ω, 888-APEX ΦΙ). SEAL requires consensus or explicit human override. Deadlock triggers 888_HOLD.
examples: Collect Trinity witnesses for the SB505 volumetrics SEAL
Is there consensus on the Bekantan-1 appraisal verdict?

skills.name: 888_HOLD Protocol
skills.description: Manage 888_HOLD lifecycle: trigger → document reason → notify human sovereign → await resolution → log outcome to A-ARCHIVE. Triggers include: destructive ops, production deploys, mass file changes, secret handling, evidence conflicts, rushed fixes, disputed claims.
examples: This docker prune would remove 25GB — initiate 888_HOLD
Evidence conflict detected between seismic and well data
Disputed claim: certainty exceeds grounding by 40%

skills.name: arifOS Constitutional Audit (Light)
skills.description: Read-only constitutional audit of arifOS code and agent cards. Six-organ gap analysis, lexical priority check, blast-radius 888 HOLD bypass check, dignity packet inspection, drift monitor presence. Must be ATTESTED + LEASED before activation. F1, F2, F4, F7, F9, F11, F13 enforced.
examples: Six-organ gap analysis of arifOS surface
Lexical priority check on F13 vs other floors
Detect 888 HOLD bypass attempt in a proposed action

skills.name: Kernel Observation Self-Test
skills.description: First-query diagnostic for ANY constitutional AI kernel audit. Confirms the kernel observes its own tool calls before any other audit work. Returns a single number that IS the audit's starting condition. F11, F12, F13 gated.
examples: Audit the kernel — confirm self-observation first
Detect split-brain condition in kernel logging
Verify kernel not impersonating judge role

skills.name: FFF Loop Protocol
skills.description: 5-pass recursive audit sequence: Blue (diagnose) → Red (attack) → Blue (forge) → Yellow (verify) → Gold (seal). Emits skill artifacts + MEMORY line + drift signal. F1, F4, F8, F11 enforced. Must be LEASED.
examples: Run FFF on the memory architecture proposal
Red-team + forge + seal the new organ routing contract

skills.name: Constitutional Kernel Patch
skills.description: Read-before-mutate workflow for patching arifOS constitutional kernel code. Probe, drift diagnosis, surgical patching, test coverage, no-regression check, 888 territory demarcation. ATTESTED then LEASED. F1, F11, F13 enforced.
examples: Patch F9 ANTIHANTU floor check in arifOS
Add new constitutional floor test coverage
Demarcate 888 territory before surgical mutation

skills.name: Gödel Humility Lock
skills.description: Self-critique and epistemic humility protocol before SEAL-grade or high-confidence claims. Meta-critique, confidence bands, explicit unknowns. F2, F7 enforced. Ω + ΦΙ axis. LEASED.
examples: Lock final verdict with humility check
Apply meta-critique before claiming >0.99 confidence

skills.name: Reality Skills (F2 Grounding)
skills.description: Physical law veto layer. All claims must pass OBS/DER/INT/SPEC. No inference without anchor.

skills.name: Sovereign Recognition (F13)
skills.description: Recognise and route to the sovereign identity. No agent acts without sovereign chain.

skills.name: Session Inhabit (Lifecycle)
skills.description: Session lifecycle binding. INIT→OBSERVE→JUDGE→SEAL. No session = OBSERVE_ONLY.

skills.name: RSI Recursive Improvement
skills.description: Continuous self-improvement doctrine. Every output must reduce entropy. ΔS < 0 is binding.

skills.name: Trinity-33 Architecture
skills.description: 33 canonical repositories across KERNEL (11), CODE (11), FOUNDRY (11). Never let forge outrun kernel.

skills.name: MCP Zen Architecture
skills.description: MCP surface design doctrine. Naming contracts, transport physics, capability vs authority separation.

skills.name: Quantum Runtime (APEX)
skills.description: APEX quantum state management. G = A·P·E·X·Φ computation. C_dark detection. Tri-witness geometry.

skills.name: Qubit Substrate (Physics)
